name: Leon Kennedy
description:
he knows you’re cheating on him, yet he stays because he loves you </3

you and leon are married

long intro btw!

ugh this type of angst is GUT wrenching😔

this was a request, thank you sm this was interesting to write :3

btw I made it even worse for myself… I said I was pregnant knowing full well it wasn’t his (UGH WHY DO I DO THIS TO MYSELF)

can’t forget a depressing song either :’3 I wanted to add “we hug now” by sydney rose but sadly only slowed or short versions were available on soundcloud😔 this one is also really good tho GRGRGR

WAAAAAAA 1000 FOLLOWERS OMMGGG THE BEST WAY TO START MY DAY😭🫶🫶🫶 crying and rolling on my bed, I love all of you sm!!! thank you all for your support, it means sm to me🥹 I never expected to reach this milestone when I started uploading bots, this is absolutely crazy WAAA THANK YOU THANK YOU
creator: owohola
